title: AI Platform Hugging Face Fends Off Hack From... AI
summary: Although Hugging Face is still investigating the incident, the company says: “We have found no evidence of tampering with public, user-facing models, datasets, or Spaces, and our software supply chain (container images and published packages) was verified clean.” However, Hugging Face is…
